content.problemStatement:
Given an array that contains only 1 and 0 return the count of maximum
    consecutive ones in the array..
constraints: N is the number of elements in the input array
Each element in the array is either 0 or 1
content.inputFormat: An array of integers containing only 1 and 0
content.outputFormat: The count of maximum consecutive ones in the array

solution.approach: Iterate through the array and keep track of the maximum consecutive ones
